questions.statement:
<p>Suneet walked 10 m towards the north, then he turned left and walked 11 m, then from there he turned right and walked 13 m, and then he turned right again and walked 25 m. In which direction is Suneet facing now?</p>

<p>(All turns are 90 degree turns only)</p>

BEH : FJN : : ILO : ?
In a 50 over match, the chasing team scored 5 runs per over in the first 30 over. Required run rate is 10 runs per over. What is the score of first team?
Rishabh is 15<sup>th </sup>from left end and 23rd from right end in a row of students. How many students are there in the row?
questions.explanation:
<p>Total students = (Students from left end + Students from right end) &ndash; 1 = (15 + 23) &ndash; 1 = 37</p>
Hence, there are 37 students in the row.
